---
title: "Background"
author: "Laurie Platt"
date: last-modified
date-format: "[Last updated ] DD MMMM, YYYY"
format:
  html:
    code-tools: true
    self-contained: false
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 5
    toc-expand: 2
    number-sections: true
    fig-cap-location: top
    code-links:
      - text: scc-pi/traffic-collisions
        icon: github
        href: https://github.com/scc-pi/traffic-collisions
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## People  

```{mermaid}
%%| label: gap-analysis
%%| fig-cap: "Figure: People & Services"
%%| echo: true
%%| code-fold: hide

flowchart TD

    Data1["James Ford<br/>Chief Data Officer"]
    Data2["Nicola Mchugh<br/>Corporate Performance & Insight Manager"]
    Data3["Laurie Platt<br/>Data Scientist"] 
    RS1["Tracy Hendry<br/>Road Safety Manager"]
    RS2["Ashley Carnall<br/>Road Safety Auditor"]
    RS3["Ian Woodhouse<br/>Transport Planner"]
    Programme1["Richard Whiteley"]
    
    Data1 --> Data2 --> Data3
```

## Decision Process

### AS-IS (spots) 

```{mermaid}
%%| label: gap-analysis
%%| fig-cap: "Figure: AS-IS (spots) Decision Process"
%%| echo: true
%%| code-fold: hide

flowchart TD

    Analysis1["STATS19<br/><b>hot-spot</b> analysis<br/>(<i>Officer</i>)"]
    Analysis2["Investigation of individual<br/><b>spots & lengths</b><br/>(<i>Officer</i>)"]
    Analysis3["Local Safety schemes<br/><b>criteria</b><br/>(<i>Members</i>)"] 
    List1["Local Safety schemes<br/><b>draft priority list</b><br/>(<i>Officer</i>)"]
    List2["Local Safety schemes<br/><b>recommended priority list</b><br/>(<i>Manager</i>)"]
    List3["Local Safety schemes<br/><b>agreed priority list</b><br/>(<i>Members</i>)"]
    Programme1["Local Safety schemes<br/><b>programme</b><br/>(<i>Officer</i>)"]
    
    Analysis1 --> List1
    Analysis2 --> List1
    Analysis3 --> List1
    List1 --> List2 --> List3 --> Programme1
```

### EMERGING-AS-IS (lengths)  


### TO-BE (lengths) 

## Data Analysis Process

### AS-IS (lengths)  


### TO-BE (lengths)
